Name: Side A Amount (High 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed amount in current transaction (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side A Amount (Low 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed amount in current transaction (combined with Reg1)

Name: Side A Quantity (High 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed quantity in current transaction (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side A Quantity (Low 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed quantity in current transaction (combined with Reg3)

Name: Side A Electronic Totalizer (High 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative amount since last reset - electronic (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side A Electronic Totalizer (Low 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative amount since last reset - electronic (combined with Reg5)

Name: Side A Flowmeter Totalizer (High 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative quantity since last reset - flowmeter (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side A Flowmeter Totalizer (Low 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative quantity since last reset - flowmeter (combined with Reg7)

Name: Side A PT1 Pressure
Description: Pressure from Transmitter 1 (Side A inlet)

Name: Side A PT2 Pressure
Description: Pressure from Transmitter 2 (Side A outlet)

Name: Side A Flowrate (High 16 bits)
Description: Current flowrate in kg/min (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side A Flowrate (Low 16 bits)
Description: Current flowrate in kg/min (combined with Reg11)

Name: Side A Error Status
Description: Error and status flags: Bit0=Flowmeter_Error, Bit1=PT_Error, Bit2=Solenoid_Fault, Bit3=Safety_Interlock, Bit4=Overtemp, Bit5=Underpressure, Bit6=Overpressure, Bit7=Control_Fault

Name: Side A Emergency Stop Control
Description: Write 1 to set emergency stop; Write 0 to reset emergency stop

Name: Side A Temperature
Description: Optional: Temperature of pump or solenoid bank (signed integer)

Name: Side B Amount (High 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed amount in current transaction (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side B Amount (Low 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed amount in current transaction (combined with Reg16)

Name: Side B Quantity (High 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed quantity in current transaction (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side B Quantity (Low 16 bits)
Description: Dispensed quantity in current transaction (combined with Reg18)

Name: Side B Electronic Totalizer (High 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative amount since last reset - electronic (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side B Electronic Totalizer (Low 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative amount since last reset - electronic (combined with Reg20)

Name: Side B Flowmeter Totalizer (High 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative quantity since last reset - flowmeter (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side B Flowmeter Totalizer (Low 16 bits)
Description: Cumulative quantity since last reset - flowmeter (combined with Reg22)

Name: Side B PT3 Pressure
Description: Pressure from Transmitter 3 (Side B inlet - labeled PT1 on this side)

Name: Side B PT4 Pressure
Description: Pressure from Transmitter 4 (Side B outlet - labeled PT2 on this side)

Name: Side B Flowrate (High 16 bits)
Description: Current flowrate in kg/min (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Side B Flowrate (Low 16 bits)
Description: Current flowrate in kg/min (combined with Reg26)

Name: Side B Error Status
Description: Error and status flags: Same bit layout as Side A (Bit0-7 as per Side A definition)

Name: Side B Emergency Stop Control
Description: Write 1 to set emergency stop; Write 0 to reset emergency stop

Name: Side B Temperature
Description: Optional: Temperature of pump or solenoid bank (signed integer)

Name: First Rate (High 16 bits)
Description: Pricing: First rate cost per unit mass (part of 32-bit float)

Name: First Rate (Low 16 bits)
Description: Pricing: First rate cost per unit mass (combined with Reg31)

Name: Second Rate (High 16 bits)
Description: Pricing: Second rate cost per unit mass (part of 32-bit float)

Name: Second Rate (Low 16 bits)
Description: Pricing: Second rate cost per unit mass (combined with Reg33)
